privileged_info_summary: The task requires compositing the 'dwanko_run.tnz' scene with a Studio Ghibli background ('chihiro050.jpg'). The source scene is located at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz and contains a default camera resolution of 1920x1080. The downloaded background image is at /home/ga/OpenToonz/backgrounds/scene_background.jpg. The agent must export at least 20 composite frames (expected to be >200 KB total) at 1920x1080 resolution to the /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/composite_frames directory.
